title: Components, Cycles, Topological Order, and Unweighted Paths · Invariant Triage
summary: Validate a deployment dependency plan and explain unreachable service routes. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a dependency analyzer with path evidence and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Find connected components and explain what connectivity means for the modeled domain.
Detect undirected and directed cycles with the correct parent or active-path state.
Produce and validate a topological order or return concrete cycle evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
